sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt64, number Nullable(Int32), value String, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id;
SELECT groupArrayLast(2)(number) AS last_numbers FROM test_data WHERE value NOT IN (SELECT value FROM test_data WHERE number IS NOT NULL GROUP BY value HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, groupArrayLast(3)(number) AS last_numbers FROM test_data WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE number <= 10) GROUP BY id HAVING count() > 1;
SELECT id, groupArrayLast(2)(number) AS last_non_null_numbers FROM test_data WHERE created_at NOT IN (SELECT created_at FROM test_data WHERE value IS NULL) GROUP BY id ORDER BY last_non_null_numbers;

SELECT id, COUNT(value), groupArrayLast(1)(value) AS last_value FROM test_data WHERE value NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM test_data WHERE number IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(value) > 0 ORDER BY last_value DESC;
SELECT id, groupArrayLast(2)(number) AS last_numbers FROM (SELECT * FROM test_data WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE number IS NULL) ORDER BY created_at) AS sub_query GROUP BY id;
